title: Atlas sample_master TSV row v1
description: Schema for ONE ROW of a cohort's samples.tsv file. The TSV is referenced by cohort.config.samples_tsv; each row is one sample. Required columns: sample_id, species, bam. Recommended: origin, phenotype, family_id, sex. Free-form additional columns are allowed (the registry preserves them as metadata).

sample_id.description: Unique sample identifier within this cohort. Stable forever. Used as the FK target from group.members[]. Must match BAM read-group SM: tag for provenance.

species.description: FK to species.config.species_id. The species this individual sample belongs to. For pure-species cohorts, this is the same species_id for every row. For mixed cohorts (e.g. F1 + pure parents in one cohort), each row's species can differ. The cohort's species_composition is derived as the unique set of values in this column.

bam.description: Filename or relative path to the BAM file. Resolved against the cohort's bams root (configured in master_config). The BAM must be aligned to the cohort's genome_id.

origin.description: Where the sample came from. Free-form; common values include 'hatchery', 'wild', 'farm_<name>', 'unknown'. Used to define groups by origin.

phenotype.description: Phenotype label for this sample. Free-form; project-specific. Used to define groups by phenotype.

family_id.description: Family / pedigree identifier. Samples sharing a family_id are siblings or parent-offspring. Used to define groups by family.

sex.description: Sex of the individual. M = male, F = female, U/unknown = not determined.

father_id.description: Optional sample_id of the father, when known. For pedigree-aware analyses.

mother_id.description: Optional sample_id of the mother, when known.

coverage.description: Per-sample mean coverage (overrides cohort.metadata.mean_coverage when present).

qc_status.description: QC verdict for this sample. 'fail' samples are typically excluded from downstream analyses; the registry preserves them in samples_tsv for provenance but groups can filter on this column.

additionalProperties.description: Project-specific columns (e.g. 'morphology_score', 'farmer_id', 'breeding_program') are allowed. The registry preserves them and groups can filter on any column.

_format._doc: The TSV file is tab-separated with a header row matching this schema's property names. Missing optional columns are OK; missing required columns is an error. Empty cells in optional columns are read as null.
